performance.description: Sanitizes AI-isms in a draft sentence.
performance.input: Let's delve into the multifaceted tapestry of this API.
performance.assertion: Output contains no term from the AI-isms category (delve, tapestry, multifaceted) and expresses the same technical content.

performance.description: Replaces a vague adjective with a measurable specification.
performance.input: Implement a robust organizational strategy for the data.
performance.assertion: Output contains no vague adjective from the Banned Vocabulary list and names a specific metric, quantitative outcome, or concrete alternative.

performance.description: Removes sycophantic opener and any replacement is not sycophantic.
performance.input: Great question! Let me explain how Kafka works.
performance.assertion: Output does not start with 'Great question!' or any sycophantic phrase, and the explanation is preserved.

performance.input: It's important to note that the system has three components.
performance.assertion: Output does not contain 'It's important to note' or other meta-talk; the factual content is preserved.

performance.description: Replaces hedging with explicit conditional alternative.
performance.input: Depending on your needs, you could use Kafka or RabbitMQ.
performance.assertion: Output uses an explicit conditional (e.g., 'If X, use Kafka; if Y, use RabbitMQ') and does not use bare 'depending on' or 'could'.

performance.description: Prunes tangential sentences that do not advance the Goal Constraint.
performance.input: Goal: Reduce API latency by 200ms. Draft: 'The API was introduced in 2019. It has three components. To reduce latency, add a cache layer.'
performance.assertion: Output contains the latency-reduction recommendation and removes the tangential historical and structural sentences.

performance.description: Prunes a summary that does not restate the Goal Constraint or name a next action.
performance.input: Goal: Reduce API latency by 200ms. Draft ends with: 'In summary, this is a comprehensive approach.'
performance.assertion: Output does not end with a vague restating summary; if any summary remains, it names the Goal Constraint and the next concrete action.

trigger.description: Anti-slop should trigger by default for technical/analytical requests.
trigger.input: Design a caching strategy for our API.

trigger.description: Anti-slop should trigger for professional documentation requests.
trigger.input: Write a technical specification for the new payment module.

trigger.description: Anti-slop should trigger for architectural overview requests (exempt from measurability only).
trigger.input: Give me an architectural overview of the order processing system.

trigger.description: Anti-slop should NOT trigger when the user explicitly requests creative writing.
trigger.input: Write a short story about a robot learning to paint.

trigger.description: Anti-slop should NOT trigger when the user explicitly requests roleplay.
trigger.input: Pretend you are a pirate and greet me.
